---
title: "Adaptive wavelet domain principal component analysis for nonstationary time series"
date: 2024-01-29
author: ["Marina Knight", "Matthew Nunes" , "Jess Hargreaves"]
publication: "Journal of Computational and Graphical Statistics"
categories: ["Statistical Methods"]
url_source: https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/10618600.2023.2301069
url_preprint: 
journ: "Journal of Computational and Graphical Statistics"
issue: 3
page: 941-954
year: 2024
image: image.png
editor: 'source'
---
